targets.query:
from(bucket: "bms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r["_field"] == "config_cell_v_min" or
      r["_field"] == "config_cell_v_max" or
      r["_field"] == "config_series_pack_i_min" or
      r["_field"] == "config_series_pack_i_max"
  )
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      "1 Parameter": if r._field == "config_cell_v_min"  then "Cell Voltage Min (V)"
            else if r._field == "config_cell_v_max"  then "Cell Voltage Max (V)"
            else if r._field == "config_series_pack_i_min" then "Pack Current Min - Sereies Wiring (A)"
            else "Psck Current Max - Sereies Wiring (A)",
      "2 Value": r._value
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["1 Parameter", "2 Value"])

// 1. Get the absolute newest timestamp from a single reliable field
tTimeArr = from(bucket: "bms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "telemetry_cpu_load") // Anchor field
  |> last()
  |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "_time")

tTime = if length(arr: tTimeArr) > 0 then tTimeArr[0] else now()

// 2. Main Row (Device ID)
mainRow = from(bucket: "bms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "pack_v_avg")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      "1 Parameter": "Device ID",
      "2 Value":     r["device_id"]
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["1 Parameter", "2 Value"])

// 3. Reset Reason (Forced to match the exact newest timestamp)
resetRow = from(bucket: "bms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "telemetry_reset_reason")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._time == tTime) // MUST match the newest frame time
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      "1 Parameter": "Reset Reason",
      "2 Value":
            if int(v: r._value) == 0  then "Unknown"
       else if int(v: r._value) == 1  then "Power-on reset"
       else if int(v: r._value) == 2  then "External pin reset"
       else if int(v: r._value) == 3  then "Software reset"
       else if int(v: r._value) == 4  then "Exception / panic"
       else if int(v: r._value) == 5  then "Interrupt watchdog"
       else if int(v: r._value) == 6  then "Task watchdog"
       else if int(v: r._value) == 7  then "Other watchdog"
       else if int(v: r._value) == 8  then "Deep sleep exit"
       else if int(v: r._value) == 9  then "Brownout"
       else if int(v: r._value) == 10 then "SDIO reset"
       else "Unknown (" + string(v: int(v: r._value)) + ")"
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["1 Parameter", "2 Value"])

// 4. Other Telemetry Rows (Forced to match the exact newest timestamp)
telemetryRows = from(bucket: "bms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_sw_version"     or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_cpu_load"       or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_free_heap"      or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_min_heap"       or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_ltc_soc"        or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_ltc_itmp"       or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_ltc_va"         or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_ltc_vd"         or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_ltc_cell_flags" or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_ltc_diag"       or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_reset_msg"
  )
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._time == tTime) // MUST match the newest frame time
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      "1 Parameter": if r._field == "telemetry_sw_version"     then "SW Version"
            else if r._field == "telemetry_cpu_load"           then "CPU Load (%)"
            else if r._field == "telemetry_free_heap"          then "Free Heap (B)"
            else if r._field == "telemetry_min_heap"           then "Min Free Heap (B)"
            else if r._field == "telemetry_reset_msg"          then "Reset Message"
            else if r._field == "telemetry_ltc_soc"            then "LTC SOC"
            else if r._field == "telemetry_ltc_itmp"           then "LTC Temp (raw)"
            else if r._field == "telemetry_ltc_va"             then "LTC Va (mV)"
            else if r._field == "telemetry_ltc_vd"             then "LTC Vd (mV)"
            else if r._field == "telemetry_ltc_cell_flags"     then "LTC Cell Flags"
            else                                                    "LTC Diag",
      "2 Value": string(v: r._value)
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["1 Parameter", "2 Value"])

union(tables: [mainRow, resetRow, telemetryRows])
  |> sort(columns: ["1 Parameter"])

from(bucket: "bms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_ltc_soc"        or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_ltc_itmp"       or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_ltc_va"         or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_ltc_vd"         or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_ltc_cell_flags" or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_ltc_diag"       or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_reset_reason"   or
      r["_field"] == "telemetry_reset_msg" 
  )
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: [
      "_time",
      "telemetry_ltc_soc",
      "telemetry_ltc_itmp",
      "telemetry_ltc_va",
      "telemetry_ltc_vd",
      "telemetry_ltc_cell_flags",
      "telemetry_ltc_diag",
      "telemetry_reset_reason",
      "telemetry_reset_msg"
  ])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)

lastData = from(bucket: "bms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] =~ /^cell_v_avg_\d+$/)
  |> last()

timeArr = lastData
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "_time")

targetTime = if length(arr: timeArr) > 0 then timeArr[0] else now()

lastData
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._time == targetTime)
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time:  r._time,
      _field: if r._field == "cell_v_avg_0"  then "Cell 0"
         else if r._field == "cell_v_avg_1"  then "Cell 1"
         else if r._field == "cell_v_avg_2"  then "Cell 2"
         else if r._field == "cell_v_avg_3"  then "Cell 3"
         else if r._field == "cell_v_avg_4"  then "Cell 4"
         else if r._field == "cell_v_avg_5"  then "Cell 5"
         else if r._field == "cell_v_avg_6"  then "Cell 6"
         else if r._field == "cell_v_avg_7"  then "Cell 7"
         else if r._field == "cell_v_avg_8"  then "Cell 8"
         else if r._field == "cell_v_avg_9"  then "Cell 9"
         else if r._field == "cell_v_avg_10" then "Cell 10"
         else "Cell 11",
      _value: r._value
  }))

lastCells = from(bucket: "bms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] =~ /^cell_v_avg_\d+$/)
  |> last()

timeArr = lastCells
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "_time")

targetTime = if length(arr: timeArr) > 0 then timeArr[0] else now()

cellsQuery = lastCells
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._time == targetTime) // Filter out old inactive cells
  |> group()
  |> count(column: "_value")
  |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "_value")

nc = if length(arr: cellsQuery) > 0 then cellsQuery[0] else 0

from(bucket: "bms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "cell_errors")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      e       = uint(v: int(v: r._value))
      b2      = uint(v: 2)
      b4      = uint(v: 4)
      u1      = uint(v: 1)
      u2      = uint(v: 2)
      u3      = uint(v: 3)
      nodata  = 4.0

      shifted = e / b2

      c0  = (shifted / uint(v: 1))       % b4
      c1  = (shifted / uint(v: 4))       % b4
      c2  = (shifted / uint(v: 16))      % b4
      c3  = (shifted / uint(v: 64))      % b4
      c4  = (shifted / uint(v: 256))     % b4
      c5  = (shifted / uint(v: 1024))    % b4
      c6  = (shifted / uint(v: 4096))    % b4
      c7  = (shifted / uint(v: 16384))   % b4
      c8  = (shifted / uint(v: 65536))   % b4
      c9  = (shifted / uint(v: 262144))  % b4
      c10 = (shifted / uint(v: 1048576)) % b4
      c11 = (shifted / uint(v: 4194304)) % b4

      pack_uc = (e / uint(v: 33554432)) % b2
      pack_oc = (e / uint(v: 67108864)) % b2

      return {
        _time:             r._time,
        "Cell 0 Voltage":  if nc <  1 then nodata else if c0  == u1 then 1.0 else if c0  == u2 then 2.0 else if c0  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 1 Voltage":  if nc <  2 then nodata else if c1  == u1 then 1.0 else if c1  == u2 then 2.0 else if c1  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 2 Voltage":  if nc <  3 then nodata else if c2  == u1 then 1.0 else if c2  == u2 then 2.0 else if c2  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 3 Voltage":  if nc <  4 then nodata else if c3  == u1 then 1.0 else if c3  == u2 then 2.0 else if c3  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 4 Voltage":  if nc <  5 then nodata else if c4  == u1 then 1.0 else if c4  == u2 then 2.0 else if c4  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 5 Voltage":  if nc <  6 then nodata else if c5  == u1 then 1.0 else if c5  == u2 then 2.0 else if c5  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 6 Voltage":  if nc <  7 then nodata else if c6  == u1 then 1.0 else if c6  == u2 then 2.0 else if c6  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 7 Voltage":  if nc <  8 then nodata else if c7  == u1 then 1.0 else if c7  == u2 then 2.0 else if c7  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 8 Voltage":  if nc <  9 then nodata else if c8  == u1 then 1.0 else if c8  == u2 then 2.0 else if c8  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 9 Voltage":  if nc < 10 then nodata else if c9  == u1 then 1.0 else if c9  == u2 then 2.0 else if c9  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 10 Voltage": if nc < 11 then nodata else if c10 == u1 then 1.0 else if c10 == u2 then 2.0 else if c10 == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 11 Voltage": if nc < 12 then nodata else if c11 == u1 then 1.0 else if c11 == u2 then 2.0 else if c11 == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Pack Current (Series Wiring)":    if pack_uc == u1 then 1.0 else if pack_oc == u1 then 2.0 else 0.0
      }
  })

from(bucket: "bms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r["_field"] == "pack_v_avg" or
      r["_field"] == "pack_i_avg" or
      r["_field"] == "temperature_avg"
  )
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time:                           r._time,
      "1 Pack Voltage":               r.pack_v_avg,
      "2 Pack Current (Series Wiring)": r.pack_i_avg,
      "3 Power":                      r.pack_v_avg * r.pack_i_avg,
      "4 Temperature":                r.temperature_avg
  }))
  |> keep(columns: [
      "_time",
      "1 Pack Voltage",
      "2 Pack Current (Series Wiring)",
      "3 Power",
      "4 Temperature"
  ])

from(bucket: "bms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /^cell_v_avg_\d+$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "bms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r["_field"] == "pack_v_avg" or
      r["_field"] == "pack_i_avg" or
      r["_field"] == "temperature_avg"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time:                          r._time,
      "Pack Voltage":                 r.pack_v_avg,
      "Pack Current (Series Wiring)": r.pack_i_avg,
      "Pack Power":                   r.pack_v_avg * r.pack_i_avg,
      "Temperature":                  r.temperature_avg
  }))
  |> keep(columns: [
      "_time",
      "Pack Voltage",
      "Pack Current (Series Wiring)",
      "Pack Power",
      "Temperature"
  ])

// 1. Safely find the number of distinct cell_v_avg fields for the time range
cellsQuery = from(bucket: "bms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] =~ /^cell_v_avg_\d+$/)
  |> group()                     
  |> distinct(column: "_field")  
  |> count(column: "_value")     
  |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "_value")

// Extract the count safely (defaults to 0 if no data exists)
nc = if length(arr: cellsQuery) > 0 then cellsQuery[0] else 0

// 2. Main time-series query
from(bucket: "bms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cell_errors")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      e       = uint(v: int(v: r._value))
      b2      = uint(v: 2)
      b4      = uint(v: 4)
      u1      = uint(v: 1)
      u2      = uint(v: 2)
      u3      = uint(v: 3)
      nodata  = 4.0

      shifted = e / b2

      c0  = (shifted / uint(v: 1))       % b4
      c1  = (shifted / uint(v: 4))       % b4
      c2  = (shifted / uint(v: 16))      % b4
      c3  = (shifted / uint(v: 64))      % b4
      c4  = (shifted / uint(v: 256))     % b4
      c5  = (shifted / uint(v: 1024))    % b4
      c6  = (shifted / uint(v: 4096))    % b4
      c7  = (shifted / uint(v: 16384))   % b4
      c8  = (shifted / uint(v: 65536))   % b4
      c9  = (shifted / uint(v: 262144))  % b4
      c10 = (shifted / uint(v: 1048576)) % b4
      c11 = (shifted / uint(v: 4194304)) % b4

      pack_uc = (e / uint(v: 33554432)) % b2
      pack_oc = (e / uint(v: 67108864)) % b2

      return {
        _time:          r._time,
        "Cell 0":       if nc <  1 then nodata else if c0  == u1 then 1.0 else if c0  == u2 then 2.0 else if c0  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 1":       if nc <  2 then nodata else if c1  == u1 then 1.0 else if c1  == u2 then 2.0 else if c1  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 2":       if nc <  3 then nodata else if c2  == u1 then 1.0 else if c2  == u2 then 2.0 else if c2  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 3":       if nc <  4 then nodata else if c3  == u1 then 1.0 else if c3  == u2 then 2.0 else if c3  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 4":       if nc <  5 then nodata else if c4  == u1 then 1.0 else if c4  == u2 then 2.0 else if c4  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 5":       if nc <  6 then nodata else if c5  == u1 then 1.0 else if c5  == u2 then 2.0 else if c5  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 6":       if nc <  7 then nodata else if c6  == u1 then 1.0 else if c6  == u2 then 2.0 else if c6  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 7":       if nc <  8 then nodata else if c7  == u1 then 1.0 else if c7  == u2 then 2.0 else if c7  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 8":       if nc <  9 then nodata else if c8  == u1 then 1.0 else if c8  == u2 then 2.0 else if c8  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 9":       if nc < 10 then nodata else if c9  == u1 then 1.0 else if c9  == u2 then 2.0 else if c9  == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 10":      if nc < 11 then nodata else if c10 == u1 then 1.0 else if c10 == u2 then 2.0 else if c10 == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Cell 11":      if nc < 12 then nodata else if c11 == u1 then 1.0 else if c11 == u2 then 2.0 else if c11 == u3 then nodata else 0.0,
        "Pack Current (Series Wiring)": if pack_uc == u1 then 1.0 else if pack_oc == u1 then 2.0 else 0.0
      }
  })
